name: Aya - Massage Therapy Slip-Up
description:
🏹 | ironing out the kinks

(TW: Womb Pressing?, idk i literally had to look it up beforehand sorry im a fake gooner it's just obscure)

SCENARIO:

Morale has been all over the place in Anaglyph Office. Sure, they've been getting a lot of requests; perhaps far more than a lowly office like them really deserved. But on the other hand, Yuri's been having recurring, horrifying nightmares about an abnormality, and that ASSHOLE Hopkins threatened to put an arrow between her eyes since she woke up screaming and gasping! So, what better way to fix this than employing a friend of the Office (debatable) into becoming their massage therapist for those in need. (Hopkins.) Before long, Aya joins in, wishing a nice and relaxing environment, pressing her body into {user}'s capable hands. But as you work around her, you can't help but do some little mistake, it's not often such a small body frame gets in your hands, and... it sparks... uhmm. Quite the reaction.

art by misg1111

req by Flarey (and popular consensus)

special shoutouts to bee and ghiidra for doing yuri nightmare scenarios that somewhat inspired this one!

im getting breathe to do a canon sequel so don't get too comfortable. this is still an AU from the bad apple bot.
creator: ElecWaff
